top_signals.title: US, Iran Agree to Halt Attacks Ahead of Talks
top_signals.summary: The US and Iran have agreed to stop attacking each other before peace talks resume this week over the Strait of Hormuz and other issues, paving the way to end days of tit-for-tat attacks that tested a fragile truce. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australian Gas Exploration Surges as Energy Security Takes Center Stage
top_signals.summary: Investment in natural gas exploration in Australia hit the highest in ten years amid the energy crunch caused by the war in the Middle East, totaling the equivalent of $329 million in the first quarter of the year, government data showed, as quoted by Reuters. The publication cited Rystad Energy as forecasting a 10% increase in gas exploration investment for the full year, as the world’s second-largest LNG exporter doubles down on one of its best-selling commodities. This means the total spent on exploration in 2026 would top $1 billion.…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SecondFi maps recovery path after $2.4 million Cardano wallet exploit, aims to return funds within two weeks
top_signals.summary: An exploit drained about $2.4 million in ADA from 374 addresses over three days through a flaw in SecondFi's wallet-generation software.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anthropic is testing desktop-like Claude Cowork for mobile
top_signals.summary: Anthropic appears to be testing Claude Cowork support on mobile, allowing you to manage long-running Claude tasks from your phone. [...]
